task_title: Output — embed run metadata (instrument, timeframe, date range, params) in backtest result JSON and filename

priya_plan.plan_summary: Add RunConfig metadata struct to internal/output, wire it into JSON output via struct embedding (jsonResult merges RunConfig fields and analytics.Report at the top level), add DefaultOutPath helper to internal/cmdutil, and update cmd/backtest (auto-generated default filename + RunConfig threading), cmd/sweep (run metadata printed as header), and cmd/universe-sweep (run metadata logged to stderr).
priya_plan.approach: Define RunConfig as an exported struct in internal/output with string fields and omitempty JSON tags. Add RunConfig RunConfig to output.Config. An unexported jsonResult struct embeds analytics.Report and carries RunConfig fields. Add DefaultOutPath to internal/cmdutil. cmd/backtest computes default out path post-parse and passes RunConfig.
